overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Silent Hill 2 Remake showing the protagonist walking through extremely foggy, abandoned urban residential streets. The character passes a dead body and abandoned vehicles before navigating through an intersection and arriving at the Wood Side Apartments entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy residential street with abandoned vehicle

events.description: discovering dead body lying in the middle of the foggy street
passing blue vintage sedan parked on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the foggy street, observing the abandoned surroundings and passing a body on the ground

entered.detail: multi-story brick building with fire escapes and balconies lining the right side of the street
abandoned blue sedan partially obscured by fog, parked along the curb
body lying face down in the street, creating a disturbing focal point in the fog
wooden utility pole with overhead wires stretching across the foggy street
building facade with American flag hanging from a pole

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a fog-shrouded residential street with a character walking forward. A dead body lies in the road ahead, and an abandoned blue car sits parked along the right curb. Brick apartment buildings with fire escapes line the street, barely visible through the dense fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy intersection with chain link fence and distant buildings

events.description: turning left at the intersection to navigate around the block
turning right to follow the fence line along the street

agents.ego_description: navigating through a foggy intersection, turning left then right to follow the street layout

entered.detail: tall chain link fence running along the left side of the street with trees visible behind it
distant dilapidated apartment blocks barely visible through the thick fog
low concrete wall section near the fence line

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at an intersection into a more open area, passing a chain link fence on the left with trees behind it. Distant weathered buildings loom in the fog ahead. The character then turns right, continuing along the fence line as the previous street and its abandoned car disappear into the fog behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment building entrance with stone columns and American flag

events.description: approaching the Wood Side Apartments entrance with stone columns
stopping at the entrance doors of Wood Side Apartments

agents.ego_description: walking toward and stopping at the entrance of Wood Side Apartments, facing the wooden double doors

entered.detail: imposing stone entranceway with carved Wood Side signage above double wooden doors
flanking stone columns framing the apartment entrance
American flag hanging on a pole to the right of the entrance doors
metal security gate or railing to the left of the entrance steps

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the Wood Side Apartments entrance, a distinctive stone building facade with columns and an American flag. The camera stops at the wooden double doors marked with carved signage. The surrounding fog creates an isolated, ominous atmosphere around the building entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, fog-shrouded residential district that culminates at the entrance of a looming apartment complex. It begins on a street where a dead body lies in the road and an abandoned blue car sits parked beside brick buildings barely visible through the dense haze. As the character reaches an intersection, the camera turns left into a more open area, passing a chain link fence and weathered buildings that loom in the distance. The scene then shifts as the character turns right, leaving the previous street to disappear into the fog while continuing along the fence line. Finally, the camera approaches the stone facade of the Wood Side Apartments, coming to a stop before the wooden double doors and an American flag under an isolated, ominous atmosphere.
